v0.0.1.description: The streets of rogue archipelago mod is finally here! Make sure to checkout the [setup guide](https://github.com/Jmarcs27/StreetsOfRogueArchipelago/blob/main/setup_en.md) to get everything in order. There is also a troubleshooting section for known bugs. If you encounter an issue that isn't listed, feel free to say so in the SoR thread on the archipelago discord.
v0.0.1.title: Streets of Rogue Archipelago v0.0.1

v0.0.2.description: Fixed the tutorial not releasing a check if it is skipped. Fixed goal not being marked as completed when your goal has been reached.
v0.0.2.title: Streets of Rogue Archipelago v0.0.2
